xpath.div: El empleado solo dispone de días de vacaciones pendientes.

group.p: 1. La captura de acumulados iniciales permite incorporar los valores de conceptos De Vacaciones
2. Se Hace un regla de 3 simple
3. No esta teniendo en cuenta dias no habiles o festivo por la naturaleza de la operacion
4. No esta teniendo en cuenta el valor pagado
5. Si requiere algo mas detallado seria de manera manual, esta opcion es para cuando no existe forma de tener esa informacion

t.t-value: record.contract_type.raw_value == 'fijo' || record.contract_type.raw_value == 'fijo_parcial' ? '#3498db' : record.contract_type.raw_value == 'obra' || record.contract_type.raw_value == 'obra_parcial' || record.contract_type.raw_value == 'obra_integral' ? '#e74c3c' : record.contract_type.raw_value == 'indefinido' ? '#2ecc71' : record.contract_type.raw_value == 'aprendizaje' ? '#f39c12' : record.contract_type.raw_value == 'temporal' ? '#9b59b6' : '#95a5a6'

div.class: oe_kanban_card oe_kanban_global_click rounded-3 bg-white shadow-sm border contract-card
rounded-pill bg-light px-2 py-1 me-2 small

a.class: dropdown-toggle o-no-caret btn py-0 px-1 rounded-circle
a.title: Dropdown menu

span.class: badge rounded-pill py-1 px-2 text-white me-1

div.class: alert alert-warning py-1 px-2 small rounded-pill mb-2 text-center
alert alert-danger py-1 px-2 small rounded-pill mb-2 text-center

i.class: fa fa-building me-1 opacity-50 rounded-circle bg-light p-1
i.title: Departamento

i.class: fa fa-briefcase me-1 opacity-50 rounded-circle bg-light p-1
i.title: Cargo

t.t-value: ((new Date(today) - new Date(start_date)) / (new Date(end_date) - new Date(start_date))) * 100

record.method_schedule_pay.raw_value == 'bi-weekly' ? (15 - (Math.ceil((new Date() - new Date(record.date_start.raw_value)) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) % 15)) : (30 - (Math.ceil((new Date() - new Date(record.date_start.raw_value)) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) % 30))

button.class: btn btn-sm rounded-circle btn-light border action-btn
button.name: action_state_open
button.title: Activar

button.class: btn btn-sm rounded-circle btn-light border action-btn
button.name: action_state_finished
button.title: Finalizar por liquidar

button.class: btn btn-sm rounded-circle btn-light border action-btn
button.name: action_state_cancel
button.title: Cancelar

button.class: btn btn-sm rounded-circle btn-light border action-btn
button.name: generate_labor_certificate
button.title: Certificado Laboral

button.class: btn btn-sm rounded-circle btn-light border action-btn
button.name: generate_report_severance
button.title: Carta retiro de cesantías

button.class: btn btn-sm rounded-circle btn-light border action-btn
button.name: action_open_payslips
button.title: Ver nóminas

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center border-top pt-2 pb-1

button.name: action_refuse
button.invisible: not can_approve or state not in ('confirm', 'validate1', 'validate')

button.name: action_draft
button.invisible: not can_reset or state not in ['confirm', 'refuse']

button.name: action_send_vacation_certificate
button.invisible: not is_vacation and not is_vacation_money or state != 'validate'

button.name: %(lavish_hr_payroll.action_hr_vacation_interruption_wizard)d
button.invisible: not is_vacation or state != 'validate' or is_vacation_interrupted

list.decoration-success: days_work > 0 and days_holiday == 0 and days_31 == 0 and not is_holiday

div.class: mt-2 pt-2 border-top d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

button.name: action_refuse
button.invisible: not can_approve or state not in ('confirm', 'validate1')
button.title: Rechazar

field.name: help
field.p: Cree su primera solicitud de ausencia
